notice_generation.render_rule: Generate notice, SBOM, docs-pack attribution, and provenance rows from manifest.rows[].notice; do not maintain a parallel notice list.

red_risk_dependency_reviews.fork_replace_escalate_trigger: Open replacement or local-fork review if a claimed-backend bug or hot-path budget blocker cannot be corrected inside one release family without waiting on upstream.
red_risk_dependency_reviews.required_follow_up: Complete scored upstream health, license, and backup-owner review before widening or stable promotion.

red_risk_dependency_reviews.fork_replace_escalate_trigger: Open replacement or local-fork review if claimed-platform windowing, DPI, or accessibility-root requirements can no longer be met without per-platform shell forks.
red_risk_dependency_reviews.required_follow_up: Complete scored upstream health, license, and backup-owner review before widening or stable promotion.

red_risk_dependency_reviews.fork_replace_escalate_trigger: Replace the window-present stub once the GPU-backed renderer surface is admitted; keep the shell frame and zone registry contracts intact.
red_risk_dependency_reviews.required_follow_up: Complete scored upstream health, license, and backup-owner review before widening or stable promotion.

red_risk_dependency_reviews.fork_replace_escalate_trigger: Reopen the shaping choice if a claimed script or locale requires fixes the Rust-native path cannot carry in time and the platform-native path is no longer sufficient.
red_risk_dependency_reviews.required_follow_up: Complete scored upstream health, license, and backup-owner review before widening or stable promotion.

red_risk_dependency_reviews.fork_replace_escalate_trigger: Open replacement review if glyph raster correctness, color-font coverage, or atlas pressure on claimed hosts cannot be corrected without diverging locally.
red_risk_dependency_reviews.required_follow_up: Complete scored upstream health, license, and backup-owner review before widening or stable promotion.

red_risk_dependency_reviews.fork_replace_escalate_trigger: Replace the discovery layer if host-specific path behavior or cache invalidation cannot be kept inside the VFS and shell contracts.
red_risk_dependency_reviews.required_follow_up: Complete scored upstream health, license, and backup-owner review before widening or stable promotion.

red_risk_dependency_reviews.fork_replace_escalate_trigger: Escalate to replacement or fork planning if accessibility parity on claimed hosts cannot be corrected within the protected release family.
red_risk_dependency_reviews.required_follow_up: Complete scored upstream health, license, and backup-owner review before widening or stable promotion.

red_risk_dependency_reviews.fork_replace_escalate_trigger: Replace the source family or subset plan if redistribution terms, signature posture, or glyph coverage can no longer satisfy the renderer fallback contract on the release cadence.
red_risk_dependency_reviews.required_follow_up: Complete scored upstream health, license, and backup-owner review before widening or stable promotion.

red_risk_review.promotion_rule: Red-risk protected-path dependencies block stronger claims unless the release packet narrows the claim or cites an approved mitigation.
red_risk_review.review_freshness_rule: Every red-risk row must carry next_review_due on or after the manifest as_of date before it can influence promotion decisions.

rows.fork_or_replace_trigger: Open replacement or local-fork review if a claimed-backend bug or hot-path budget blocker cannot be corrected inside one release family without waiting on upstream.
rows.name: wgpu
rows.promotion_effect: Blocks stronger release claims until dependency admission, license evidence, and upstream health review are complete.

rows.fork_or_replace_trigger: Open replacement or local-fork review if claimed-platform windowing, DPI, or accessibility-root requirements can no longer be met without per-platform shell forks.
rows.name: winit
rows.promotion_effect: Blocks stronger release claims until dependency admission, license evidence, and upstream health review are complete.

rows.fork_or_replace_trigger: Replace the window-present stub once the GPU-backed renderer surface is admitted; keep the shell frame and zone registry contracts intact.
rows.name: softbuffer
rows.promotion_effect: Blocks stronger release claims until dependency admission, license evidence, and upstream health review are complete.

rows.fork_or_replace_trigger: Reopen the shaping choice if a claimed script or locale requires fixes the Rust-native path cannot carry in time and the platform- native seam is no longer sufficient.
rows.name: rustybuzz-class shaper
rows.promotion_effect: Blocks stronger release claims until dependency admission, license evidence, and upstream health review are complete.

rows.fork_or_replace_trigger: Open replacement review if glyph raster correctness, color-font coverage, or atlas pressure on claimed hosts cannot be corrected without diverging locally.
rows.name: swash-class rasterisation
rows.promotion_effect: Blocks stronger release claims until dependency admission, license evidence, and upstream health review are complete.

rows.fork_or_replace_trigger: Replace or fork if discovery cannot maintain stable font handles across the claimed desktop matrix without host-specific escape hatches that would leak raw-path dependencies into the shell.
rows.name: fontdb-class discovery layer
rows.promotion_effect: Blocks stronger release claims until dependency admission, license evidence, and upstream health review are complete.

rows.fork_or_replace_trigger: Reopen bridge selection if a claimed OS accessibility API drifts faster than upstream can track, or if semantic-tree parity would otherwise require a private host bridge.
rows.name: accesskit-class accessibility bridge
rows.promotion_effect: Blocks stronger release claims until dependency admission, license evidence, and upstream health review are complete.

rows.fork_or_replace_trigger: Replace the source family if redistributable subset terms, signing posture, or glyph-coverage maintenance can no longer be satisfied on the release cadence.
rows.name: Noto-class fallback font source
rows.promotion_effect: Blocks stronger release claims until dependency admission, license evidence, and upstream health review are complete.

rows.fork_or_replace_trigger: Replace the source family or subset plan if redistribution terms, signature posture, or glyph coverage can no longer satisfy the renderer fallback contract on the release cadence.
rows.name: Last-resort bundled Noto-class fallback subset
rows.promotion_effect: Blocks binary distribution until first import records source archive digest, notice text, and redistribution review.

rows.fork_or_replace_trigger: Open toolchain replacement or split-lane review if the pinned channel no longer services the declared target matrix or stops receiving required security and compiler fixes.
rows.name: rustup-managed Rust toolchain
rows.promotion_effect: Recorded for provenance and environment reconstruction; does not emit binary notice text.

rows.fork_or_replace_trigger: Replace the acquisition path if rustup is no longer viable for the declared connected and offline bootstrap flows.
rows.name: rustup
rows.promotion_effect: Recorded for provenance and environment reconstruction; does not emit binary notice text.

rows.fork_or_replace_trigger: Review a replacement path only if build identity, lockfile truth, or release scripts can no longer rely on a standard Git CLI on the supported developer and CI hosts.
rows.name: Git CLI
rows.promotion_effect: Recorded for provenance and environment reconstruction; does not emit binary notice text.

rows.fork_or_replace_trigger: Rework the wrapper layer if a portable POSIX-shell path becomes necessary across the supported developer and CI matrix.
rows.name: bash
rows.promotion_effect: Recorded for provenance and environment reconstruction; does not emit binary notice text.

rows.fork_or_replace_trigger: Replace the runtime requirement if committed-seed generation or verification can no longer run portably on the supported host matrix without a virtualenv or non-standard package manager.
rows.name: python3 runtime
rows.promotion_effect: Recorded for provenance and environment reconstruction; does not emit binary notice text.

rows.fork_or_replace_trigger: Stop mirroring and fall back to project docs or browser handoff if upstream redistribution terms, signature continuity, or mirror freshness can no longer be proven.
rows.name: Mirrored official docs pack source
rows.promotion_effect: Docs-pack publication remains attribution-only until mirror metadata and upstream terms are verified.
